results.title: North America Contract Cleaning Market Forecast to Add More Than USD 35.89 Billion by 2031
results.description: Opportunities center on outsourced, performance-based cleaning, with general cleaning providing cross-sector entry and industrial facilities offering specialization potential. U.S. demand leads, while Canada favors sustainable solutions and Mexico benefits from commercial development. Automation, IoT monitoring, compliance expertise and green services can differentiate providers amid labor and margin pressures. results.title: Volumetric Video Market Projected to Reach USD 7.01 Billion by 2032 as AI and Spatial Computing Accelerate Adoption
results.description: Market growth is being supported by immersive entertainment, enterprise training, healthcare simulation, sports media and real-time 3D content applications.
